## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): subject`, imperative, lowercase, max 72 characters)
- [ ] Branch name follows the conventional branch spec (`feature/`, `bugfix/`, `chore/`, ...)
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test:coverage` and `pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] New behavior is covered by unit tests against fixtures
- [ ] Live behavior is covered by e2e tests in `e2e/` where applicable
- [ ] No comments and no `console` calls in changed files
